title: A Difficult Alarm Clock
content: For three mornings in a row, Chloe did not hear her alarm clock. She always woke up late and rushed to work feeling stressed. On Thursday night, she decided to place the alarm clock on the other side of the room. The next morning, the loud sound forced her to get out of bed to turn it off. Chloe laughed because the simple idea actually worked. She had enough time to make breakfast and drink coffee peacefully before leaving home. Her morning finally felt normal again.
